description_long: This doll features a whimsical, gothic-inspired design with a pale lavender complexion and four slender arms extending from its torso. The head is adorned with voluminous, twin pigtails in a deep purple hue, each tied with a red bow, and the face displays four black eyes and a mischievous smile. The doll wears a puffed, short-sleeved burgundy dress with a high waist, white buttons, and a petal-like skirt, paired with black thigh-high stockings and red-accented shoes. The limbs are elongated and delicate, with the hands and fingers splayed in a relaxed pose. The back of the doll reveals the symmetry of the pigtails and the arrangement of the arms, while the side views highlight the rounded shape of the dress and the doll's upright posture. The overall aesthetic is both playful and slightly eerie, making it a striking figure for urban play or display.
description: A gothic-style doll with four arms, purple pigtails, a burgundy puffed dress, and black thigh-high stockings, featuring a pale lavender complexion and a mischievous smile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's four arms, detailed facial features with four eyes, and the full design of the burgundy dress and black stockings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the layered skirt, and the arrangement of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with pigtails, the symmetry of the four arms, and the back of the dress and stockings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the curvature of the dress, and the alignment of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_style: Victorian-inspired puffed short-sleeved burgundy dress with a petal-shaped skirt, white buttons, and black thigh-high stockings with red-accented shoes; accented with red hair bows.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with head facing forward, all four arms extended outward in a relaxed, slightly bent position, and legs straight with feet together.
attribute_facial_expression: Mischievous smile with upturned mouth, four black eyes open and evenly spaced, and neutral eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, voluminous purple hair styled in twin pigtails tied with red bows.
